/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_string_operators.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_string_operators.dir/test_string_operators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_string_operators.dir/test_string_operators_lpc.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/addr_resolver.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/apply.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/backend.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/call_out.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/comm.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/command.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/ed.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/error_context.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/frame.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/interpret.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/ffi_efun.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/spatial_efun.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/aoi_efun.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/lj_ffi/lj_ffi_type.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/lj_ffi/lj_ffi_cdef.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/lj_ffi/lj_ffi_call.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/dxalloc.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/outbuf.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/simul_efun.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/simulate.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/stack.c.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/stem.cpp.o ../../src/CMakeFiles/stem.dir/stralloc.c.o -o test_string_operators  ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../lib/efuns/libefuns.a ../../lib/lpc/liblpc.a ../../lib/json/libjson.a -ldl ../../lib/socket/libsocket.a ../../lib/misc/libmisc.a ../../lib/rc/librc.a ../../lib/async/libasync.a ../../lib/logger/liblogger.a ../../lib/port/libport.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread ../../lib/spatial/libneolith_spatial.a -lm -lffi ../../lib/libgtest.a
